article.title: Things checked in Background Verification
article.content:
Hi everyone,

Just wanted to get a heads up on what all things are checked in the background verification?

post.content: They will verify your previous employers, maybe payslips, criminal records (that\'s a biggie), possibly social media activity and in some cases even a drug test. Nothing to worry about if you\'ve been a regular individual consenting of societal norms :)
